reason: All required steps executed successfully - agent found, message sent, response received with correct answer
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing "Your Agents" home page with sidebar and agent list visible
Found and clicked on agent "QA-20260606-015136-ntm8" in the sidebar - Agent detail page loaded, showing agent name in breadcrumb and configuration panels on the right
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" - Status confirmed as "idle" (visible in top right indicator with idle icon)
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" - Message typed in input field and sent successfully by clicking send button
Waited for response - Agent responded immediately, creating a new session called "Basic Math Question Session" and transitioning to "working" status during processing
Verified the response mentions "4" - Response displayed as "4" in the chat area, exactly matching the expected answer to 2+2
Took screenshot of response - Final screenshot (step5-response-received.png) shows the complete conversation with user message "Hello! What is 2+2?" and agent response "4"
